encounter.reason: Annual wellness, diabetes and hypertension follow-up

labs.name: HDL cholesterol
labs.reference_range: 50 mg/dL or greater for adult women

conditions.name: diabetic chronic kidney disease with albuminuria
diabetic peripheral neuropathy of the feet

medications.name: metformin 1000 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 1000 mg by mouth twice daily

medications.name: amlodipine 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 10 mg by mouth once daily

medications.name: hydrochlorothiazide 25 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 25 mg by mouth once daily

medications.name: atorvastatin 40 mg oral tablet
medications.reason: hyperlipidemia in the setting of diabetes

medications.name: lisinopril 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: take 10 mg by mouth once daily; stop and contact clinic if cough recurs
medications.reason: hypertension and renal protection for diabetic kidney disease with albuminuria

procedures.name: diabetic foot exam
findings: intact skin of both feet, no ulcers
mildly reduced monofilament sensation at the plantar forefeet bilaterally

document_references.name: Progress note
document_references.description: Primary care office note for annual wellness and chronic disease follow-up. Should summarize vitals, negative PHQ-2 screening, diabetic foot exam findings, fasting laboratory review, assessment of diabetes, hypertension, diabetic kidney disease, hyperlipidemia, and obesity, and the medication plan including atorvastatin increase and lisinopril retrial.

document_references.name: Preventive care update
document_references.description: Preventive care documentation tied to the annual wellness visit. Should summarize depression screening result, vaccination status reviewed during the visit, counseling on diet, weight management, foot care, and home blood pressure monitoring, and planned follow-up in 4 months.

document_references.name: Vaccine record
document_references.description: Immunization documentation for influenza vaccine administered during this encounter. Should include administration date and link the vaccine event to the office visit; prior COVID-19 primary series is historical background only.

document_references.name: Patient instructions
document_references.description: After-visit instructions covering continued metformin, amlodipine, and hydrochlorothiazide use, atorvastatin dose increase, lisinopril restart precautions related to recurrent cough, diabetic diet and weight counseling, foot care guidance, home blood pressure monitoring, and return/follow-up plan.

diagnostic_reports.type: Fasting diabetes, kidney, liver, and lipid laboratory studies
